config.name: harness_ci-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: harness_ci-latest
-- OCSF Class: Job Activity (6003)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:20:53.647751

-- Pre-compile status mapping patterns for performance
local STATUS_PATTERNS = {
    RUNNING = {activity_id = 1, activity_name = "Start", status_id = 1, status = "Success"},
    STARTED = {activity_id = 1, activity_name = "Start", status_id = 1, status = "Success"},
    SUCCEEDED = {activity_id = 2, activity_name = "Complete", status_id = 1, status = "Success"},
    CANCELLED = {activity_id = 3, activity_name = "Cancel", status_id = 99, status = "Other"},
    PAUSED = {activity_id = 3, activity_name = "Cancel", status_id = 99, status = "Other"},
    FAILED = {activity_id = 99, activity_name = "Other", status_id = 2, status = "Failure"}
}

-- Optimized field validation function
local function validate_field(value, field_name)
    if not value or value == "" then
        return nil, string.format("Missing required field: %s", field_name)
    end
    return value
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with nested structure
    local output = {
        -- Metadata fields
        class_uid = 6003,
        class_name = "Job Activity",
        category_uid = 6, 
        category_name = "Application Activity",
        type_uid = 600301,
        severity_id = 1,
        severity = "Informational",

        -- Nested objects
        job = {},
        actor = {
            user = {}
        }
    }

    -- Validate and transform required fields
    local status = validate_field(record.status, "status")
    if not status then
        return nil, "Invalid status field"
    end

    -- Apply status mapping
    local status_map = STATUS_PATTERNS[string.upper(status)]
    if status_map then
        for k,v in pairs(status_map) do
            output[k] = v
        end
    else
        output.activity_id = 99
        output.activity_name = "Other"
        output.status_id = 99
        output.status = "Unknown"
    end

    -- Efficient field mapping with validation
    local pipeline_id = validate_field(record.pipeline_id, "pipeline_id")
    if pipeline_id then
        output.job.name = pipeline_id
    end

    local execution_id = validate_field(record.execution_id, "execution_id")
    if execution_id then
        output.job.uid = execution_id
    end

    -- Copy status detail
    output.status_detail = status

    -- Optional fields with validation
    if record.initiator then
        output.actor.user.name = record.initiator
    end

    if record.trigger then
        output.job.run_type = record.trigger
    end

    if record.message then
        output.message = record.message
    end

    -- Add timestamp if not present
    if not output.time and record.timestamp then
        output.time = record.timestamp
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.job.name or not output.job.uid then
        return nil, "Missing required job fields"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, "Transform error: " .. tostring(result)
    end
    return result
end
